meta.name: Starter Assistant
meta.description: Minimum sample of a manifest-based assistant. Copy and customize.

msg.welcome:
Hello! I'm the **Starter Assistant**.
Copy this template and customize it.
msg.select_period: Select a time period to analyze.
msg.no_data:
No data found for the selected period.
Please try a different period.
msg.error:
An error occurred while fetching data.
Please wait a moment and try again.
